title: abrotanella diemii
intro: Abrotanella diemii, also known as diem's abrotanella, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. Abrotanella diemii has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of Abrotanella diemii include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
